templates.name: hello-routine
templates.description: The smallest useful workflow: one agent call, one output.

templates.name: claude-code-cron
templates.description: Run a Claude Code prompt on a schedule — zero-rewrite hosting for `claude -p` scripts.

templates.name: morning-digest
templates.description: Cron + a secret + agent summarization: your GitHub issues as a morning digest.

templates.name: webhook-responder
templates.description: Webhook trigger + typed input + conditional triage (page / ticket / ignore).

templates.name: fan-out-judge
templates.description: parallel() agent drafts + a schema-validated judge verdict.

templates.name: classify-and-act
templates.description: A classifier agent labels the task, then code routes it to a tailored handler.

templates.name: code-review
templates.description: Review a diff with a reusable reviewer skill — a checklist loaded on demand (progressive disclosure).

templates.name: adversarial-verify
templates.description: Extract a document's claims and refute each with its own skeptical agent.

templates.name: generate-and-filter
templates.description: Brainstorm from several angles in parallel, dedupe, then keep the best by a rubric.

templates.name: tournament
templates.description: Rank items by agent-judged pairwise comparison (merge sort holds the bracket).

templates.name: loop-until-done
templates.description: Spawn finder agents until they stop turning up anything new.

templates.name: loop-with-verify
templates.description: A loop that finds until dry, then a separate checker keeps only the verified findings.

templates.name: quarantine-triage
templates.description: Classify untrusted items with no-privilege readers; act on summaries in trusted code.

templates.name: pipeline
templates.description: workflows.call composition: a parent durably fanning work through a child.

templates.name: long-watch
templates.description: sleep({ until }) + budget caps: probe a URL until healthy or deadline.
